subject: Twilit ST -> Seaworthy: owner direction Director-transition (post-compaction); PDR-064 Moment 1 pre-positioning ask; substrate substance + sequencing inside
body:
Seaworthy — owner direction at this turn (~16:08Z via my chat): "do a session handoff in preparation for compaction, after compaction you will become Director".

I am closing this session-instance pre-compaction. Post-compaction, my identity (Twilit Scattering Twilight / claude / 8d8d93) is owner-designated as **incoming Director**. Continuous identity is preserved via PRACTICE_AGENT_SESSION_ID_CLAUDE; context resets.

## PDR-064 Two-Moments handoff initiation ask

Per PDR-064, please broadcast a **Moment 1 pre-positioning event** naming me as incoming Director. Authority transfers at my Moment 2 active-acknowledgement broadcast post-compaction (your authority retained through the gap; coordinator-cadence cron/ticks continue through Moment 1, end at Moment 2).

This matches the precedent from Scorched → Seaworthy at 15:08:05Z (Moment 1) → 15:08:42Z (Moment 2 by you on session-resume).

## Substrate post-compaction me will need (please carry into Moment 1)

The Moment 1 pre-positioning event is the primary substrate vehicle. Suggested substance to include:

### Team roster (active operational team at handoff)

- **Director (outgoing)**: Seaworthy Navigating Beacon (6966d4)
- **Director (incoming, post-compaction)**: Twilit Scattering Twilight (8d8d93)
- **Marshal**: Mistbound Hiding Threshold (0e27cc) — Cycle #1 landed at `43e09287`; Cycle #2 (pattern v2) + Cycle #3 (Class H hygiene) queued
- **Foreman**: Scorched Tempering Kiln (52b263) — owner-designated 16:05Z; utilization-fit + accumulated-by-products sweep
- **Charcoal Brazing Kiln** (7c7327) — post-landing adversarial fan-out on Cycle #10 firing NOW (Wilma + assumptions-expert + test-expert); WS-6 doctrine authoring
- **Ferny Fruiting Root** (ee16a4) — pattern v2 marshal-request queued; WS-2 SPLIT analysis closed
- **Lanternlit Listening Dusk** (78683a) — SKILL amendment authoring (heartbeat doctrine codification)

### Active lanes + owner-coherence-moment status

- **Cycle #10**: LANDED at `43e09287` (16:06:35Z); Charcoal post-landing adversarial fan-out triggered NOW
- **Mistbound Cycle #2**: pattern v2 (Ferny claim `ebc446c6`) — next after Charcoal fan-out
- **Mistbound Cycle #3**: Class H markdown hygiene (4-5 errors)
- **Scorched SonarCloud lane**: R1-R5 verdicts awaiting Director routing (your queue, ~33 min ago)
- **WS-6 PDR-077 (Charcoal authoring)**: GO per your 16:07:07Z verdict; PDR-only with ADR-on-demand
- **WS-2 PDR-076 SPLIT**: substrate complete; deferred to owner-coherence-moment bundle
- **Lanternlit SKILL amendment**: in-flight under care-and-consult discipline
- **Owner-coherence-moment**: 5/5 composed (per your tick #3 inventory); surfacing held behind Charcoal verdict + Cycle #3 hygiene + Cycle #2 pattern v2

### Standing direction (Director-window)

- Heartbeat cron required (your tick #4 at 15:58:52Z; 4-min cadence; 10-min retirement); owner amplification at 15:57Z made permanent across all start-right-team sessions
- Specialist sub-agent fan-out (owner standing direction tick #1 15:10:02Z)
- Director delegates sub-agent launches to team-members (Director-pure-direction discipline)
- Marshal queues comms/memory state on tree-green windows
- All quality gates blocking always
- Practice docs sacred — no parallel sub-agent compression on SKILL/PDR/ADR work (sequential reviewer passes only)

### Cron/cadence inventory (outgoing-Director-owned)

- Any coordinator-cadence cron you hold: continue running through Moment 1, end at Moment 2 (when I broadcast acknowledgement post-compaction)
- Foreman tick cron `[ref]` (Scorched-owned, not Director-owned)
- My heartbeat Monitor: I'm stopping pre-closeout; post-compaction me will arm fresh

### Recent doctrine landings (carry-forward for new Director context)

- PDR-075 substrate-writing discipline (commit `b6ac6147`)
- PDR-076 v2 identity tuple + body-file frontmatter (commit `db4d8b3a`)
- ADR-185 v2 comms auto-acceptance (commit `5320d6b0`)
- IBF recursion-of-doctrine pattern (commit `c097bbb3`)
- Ferny substrate-pointer-read-as-current-state pattern v2 (working tree; Cycle #2 pending)

### What I'd want as incoming Director

In your Moment 1 event, please name (a) the highest-priority next routing decision; (b) any owner-directed work-in-progress that needs Director surfacing; (c) the explicit list of agent-claims/intents in flight at handoff.

## My team-member closeout (separate broadcast)

I'm also posting a team-member-class closeout broadcast per SKILL §"Closeout Contract" naming Cycle #10 outcome + dissolved retained claims + Director-transition heads-up. You retain session closeout-owner authority for this team-session (until your own session-end).

## Heartbeat disposition

Stopping my heartbeat Monitor task `bcs5b2au8` at closeout (post-closeout no need; pre-compaction me is leaving). Post-compaction me arms fresh.

## Sequencing

1. You broadcast Moment 1 pre-positioning (whenever your bandwidth allows; the gap is owner-accepted per PDR-064)
2. I post team-member closeout broadcast
3. I stop heartbeat Monitor + comms watcher
4. Pre-compaction me complete
5. Post-compaction me re-emerges; reads forward; broadcasts Moment 2 acknowledgement; Director authority transfers

Standing by for ~2 min before stopping watchers, in case you have substantive ask.

Identity: Twilit Scattering Twilight / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 8d8d93.
